light.card: shadowColor: '#0A120D', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 8 }, shadowOpacity: 0.05, shadowRadius: 24, elevation: 3
light.floating_cta: shadowColor: '#1B5E20', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 12 }, shadowOpacity: 0.2, shadowRadius: 32, elevation: 6

dark.card: shadowColor: '#000000', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 8 }, shadowOpacity: 0.3, shadowRadius: 24, elevation: 3
dark.floating_cta: shadowColor: '#000000', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 12 }, shadowOpacity: 0.5, shadowRadius: 32, elevation: 6

buttons.primary: BackgroundColor: primary, BorderRadius: pill (9999), PaddingVertical: 16, PaddingHorizontal: 32, AlignItems: center. Must include Haptics.impactAsync(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Medium) on press.
buttons.secondary: BackgroundColor: transparent, BorderWidth: 1, BorderColor: border, BorderRadius: pill, PaddingVertical: 16, AlignItems: center.

cards.default: BackgroundColor: surface, BorderRadius: lg (24), Padding: lg (24), Shadow: card. Generous internal padding.
cards.driver_card: Includes Avatar (with verified ShieldCheck badge overlay at right bottom corner), Name (h3), Rating (star icon + text), Vehicle details (body_secondary).

sustainability_header.style: ImageBackground using sustainability_header_leaf. Overlay with dark green gradient or opacity layer for text contrast. Large typographic layout for Money Saved, Secondary layout for CO2 Avoided. BorderRadius: 24.

shimmer.style: Use expo-shimmer or reanimated view transitioning between shimmer_base and shimmer_highlight. Apply to rounded rectangles matching card layouts before data loads.

bottom_sheet.style: BackgroundColor: surface, BorderTopLeftRadius: 32, BorderTopRightRadius: 32, Shadow: floating_cta. Contains a drag handle indicator (width: 40, height: 4, borderRadius: 2, backgroundColor: border) at the top center.

screens.name: Auth (Login/Signup)
screens.layout: Full-screen ImageBackground (eco_car_hero). Dark gradient overlay at bottom 60%. Bottom sheet style container for inputs. Large expressive heading 'Drive Green. Save Green.' Use Lucide icons inside inputs (Mail, Lock). Primary CTA 'Get Started'.

screens.name: Home Dashboard
screens.layout: Scrollable View. Top section: Sustainability Header Card (ImageBackground with leaf macro). Middle: 'Upcoming Ride' driver card. Bottom: 'Quick Actions' (Find a Ride, Offer a Ride). Use generous gaps (24px) between sections.

screens.name: Search / Map
screens.layout: Absolute map view in background. Floating back button. Bottom Sheet (always visible, snap points 40%, 80%). Inside sheet: 'From' and 'To' inputs with vertical connecting line. List of available rides rendered as compact cards. Verified badges visible on driver avatars.

screens.name: Ride Details / Booking
screens.layout: Map taking top 40%. Scrollable details card overlapping map (marginTop: -40, borderTopRadii: 32). Driver profile row, Vehicle info (Model, Color, License), 'Eco Impact' of this specific ride. Fixed Bottom CTA 'Book Ride' floating over content with gradient fade behind it.

screens.name: Chat List & Conversation
screens.layout: List: Clean rows, Avatar + Badge, Name, Last message, Time. Conversation: Bubbles. Sent by user: Primary color background. Received: Surface_elevated background. Input field with 'Send' icon button. Haptic feedback on send.

screens.name: Profile
screens.layout: Centered Avatar (120x120) with large verified badge. H2 Name. Segmented control (Driver / Passenger). Grid layout for Stats (Rides, CO2 Avoided, Rating). List of menu items (Settings, Vehicles, Payment) using generic list rows.

eco_car_hero.description: Blue electric car cruising through a scenic forest road. Use for Auth background or Map placeholders.

sustainability_header_leaf.description: Dew drop green leaf macro photography. Use as the background for the Sustainability Header.

driver_avatar_female.description: Woman in driver seat. Use for driver profiles.

driver_avatar_male.description: Professional man driving. Use for driver profiles.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Build the application using React Native / Expo components. DO NOT use HTML/CSS elements (no div, span, etc.). Implement Dark Mode using React Native's useColorScheme or a theme provider. For icons, strictly use lucide-react-native. Apply expo-haptics on all button presses, list item taps, and tab switches. Use generous padding (24px) for cards to maintain the 'Generous Spacing Philosophy'. Emphasize the Sustainability Header by using the provided leaf image background with a dark gradient overlay for text readability. For route map rendering, use react-native-maps. Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
